ocr_findings.description: Image shows 'Lesson 08-05' label badge and large heading 'システム監査' at top, plus a decorative illustration with caption text '不正はないか？' and its explanation. OCR captures the caption section but omits the chapter sidebar text '第8章 サービスマネジメントとシステム監査' that appears vertically on the right margin of the image.

The three exam points in the image use bold orange numbered labels '（１）', '（２）', '（３）' with color emphasis. OCR renders them as plain markdown numbered list items '1.', '2.', '3.' — formatting difference only, content is preserved.
Page number '291' visible at bottom right of image is absent from OCR output.

reviewer_notes: Page introduces Lesson 08-05 システム監査 with a detective illustration and the three key exam points about system audits. All substantive content is captured. Missing vertical chapter-tab text and page number are the main omissions (med/low severity). No character-level errors detected in body text.
